prompt.content:
I need to identify the students to be considered for receiving awards at the Fall Honors Night.
Create a list of students who are current high achievers who have a Trimester 1 final grade of 95% or higher from the Grade Book. Below this, please make a list of improved students whose Trimester 1 final grade was higher than their Grade 7 EOY assessment average found in the 7th Grade EOY Results with Stats data. 
Finally, please make a list for students to consider for the highest honor and list any student who appears on both lists, and place this below the earlier two lists.
